title: Pokimane just got Exposed Live on Her Own Stream
description:
During a recent live stream Pokimane was called out by one of her own viewers, her response only proved that viewer right, making the whole thing that much more comedic. After that, another recent clip perfectly displays her fake behavior. Oh, and ya' boy also had a rather amusing moment too.
